## 3dslibris 2.6.4

Two small fixes: the "Clear Cache" button no longer shows stale text after use, and CSS keyword font sizes now apply correctly in CSS classes.

See the full changelog below for details.

### Fixes

* #98: "Clear Cache" button no longer shows stale "cleared!" text when re-entering Settings after a cache clear
* #97: CSS keyword font sizes (`font-size: small`, `font-size: smaller`, `font-size: x-small`, etc.) in CSS classes now render at the correct size, even when "Respect publisher font size" is off; numeric values (`em`, `px`, `%`) remain gated behind that setting

---

## ❤️ Community Shoutouts

3dslibris wouldn't be the same without your support! This version is dedicated to:

* **Issue reports and testing:** Thanks to everyone who reported and followed up on #97 and #98.
* **Fueling the Code:** A special thank you to my **Ko-fi supporters**. Your donations help keep the project going and keep me caffeinated!

*Want to support the project? Consider leaving a ⭐ on GitHub or [buying me a coffee](https://ko-fi.com/rigle)!*

### Included assets

- `3dslibris.cia`
- `3dslibris-debug.cia`
- `3dslibris.3dsx`
- `3dslibris-debug.3dsx`
- `3dslibris-sdmc.zip` (runtime files only; pair it with the `.3dsx` asset for Homebrew Launcher installs)
- `3dslibris-source.tar.gz`
